title: Warden's Armory
description: Defeat the Warden to obtain Warden Hearts and craft powerful armor with unique abilities. Mine rare Sculksteel blocks in the Deep Dark to forge legendary gear that grants devastating sonic boom attacks.
body:
Venture into the depths and harness the power of the Warden. This mod adds a powerful Warden-themed armor set forged from rare Sculksteel found deep within the Deep Dark biome.

Defeat the Warden to obtain Warden Hearts and craft legendary armor that grants devastating sonic boom abilities. Mine Sculksteel blocks that naturally generate in the deepest parts of the world to collect Sculk Plates for crafting.

Features:
- Full Warden armor set with high defense and toughness
- Sonic Boom attack ability (press V while wearing full armor set)
- Sculksteel blocks that naturally generate in the Deep Dark biome
- Custom Warden horns that appear on your helmet
- Warden Hearts drop from defeated Wardens
- Sculk Plates obtained by mining Sculksteel blocks
